wikitext:
{{Sequel Disambiguation}} {{Relic Infobox|Cracked Core|2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Lightning|2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Channel|2}}{{R|Cracked Core||2}} is the <!-- {{{REFER POINT 3 IF CHARACTER EXCLUSIVE}}} --> {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Starter|Starter|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}} for the {{KW|Defect||2}}. 

<!-- unconfirmed, im assumin :3 -->

== Sources ==
The {{KW|Defect||2}} will always start every new run with this relic in its possession.

== Spawn Restrictions==
Can only be obtained by the {{KW|Defect||2}}.

== Interactions ==

'''Cracked Core''' can be upgraded to {{R|Infused Core||2}} if the player obtains {{R|Touch of Orobas||2}}. This relic is randomly offered by the {{2|Ancient}} {{KW|Orobas||2}} if they are encountered at the beginning of {{2|Hive}}.

<!-- === Order === -->
<!-- Include any notable ordering here, example Dead Branch and Dark Embrace. If this is a card with Weak/Vuln + Strength/Vigor etc kind of ordering (example Wreath of Flame), uncomment the next comment. 
Note: Additive: Strength, Vigor, anything with +1
      Multiplicative: Weak, Vuln, Wrath, Divinity, Phantasmal's double damage, Lock-On, anything with %
-->
<!--
When calculating damage dealt, all the additive bonuses are added first, and then multiplicative bonuses are multiplied. The final result is rounded down. '''RELICNAME''''s {{KW|BONUSNAME}} is an additive/multiplicative bonus, (you can remove this part if irrelevant) and stacks with (most common synergy).
-->

== Synergies ==
=== Order ===
* {{R|Symbiotic Virus||2}} will {{KW|Channel||2}} 1 {{KW|Dark||2}} after the 1 {{KW|Lightning||2}} is {{KW|Channel|Channeled|2}}.
<!-- Include any notable ordering here, example Dead Branch and Dark Embrace. If this is a card with Weak/Vuln + Strength/Vigor etc kind of ordering (example Wreath of Flame), uncomment the next comment. 
Note: Additive: Strength, Vigor, anything with +1
      Multiplicative: Weak, Vuln, Wrath, Divinity, Phantasmal's double damage, Lock-On, anything with %
-->
<!--
When calculating damage dealt, all the additive bonuses are added first, and then multiplicative bonuses are multiplied. The final result is rounded down. '''RELICNAME''''s {{KW|BONUSNAME}} is an additive/multiplicative bonus, (you can remove this part if irrelevant) and stacks with (most common synergy).
-->
=== Synergies ===
* Cards and Relics that provide {{KW|Focus||2}}, such as {{R|Data Disk||2}}, {{C|Hotfix||2}}, and {{C|Defragment||2}}, will increase the damage of the {{KW|Lightning||2}} channeled by {{R|Cracked Core||2}}.
* {{R|Gold-Plated Cables||2}}, {{C|Tesla Coil||2}}, and {{C|Loop||2}} will allow the {{KW|Lightning|Lightning's|2}} passive to trigger multiple times in a turn.
* {{R|Metronome||2}} will get 1 stacks from {{R|Cracked Core||2}} {{KW|Channel|Channeling|2}} 1 {{KW|Lightning||2}}.
* {{C|Voltaic||2}} will be able to {{KW|Channel||2}} 1 additional {{KW|Lightning||2}}
* {{C|Dualcast||2}}, {{C|Quadcast||2}}, and {{C|Multi-Cast||2}} can be used to {{KW|Evoke|Evoke|2}} the {{KW|Lightning||2}}.
* {{C|Thunder||2}} will deal additional damage to each enemy hit when the {{KW|Lightning||2}} is {{KW|Evoke|Evoked|2}}.
* {{C|Coolant||2}}, {{C|Compile Driver||2}}, and {{C|Synchronize||2}} will increase their effectiveness for each Orb type {{KW|Channel|Channeled|2}}.

=== Anti-Synergies ===
<!-- Include any relevant anti-synergies here, with bullet points. Otherwise delete this section entirely. 
-->
* {{C|Hyperbeam||2}} will reduce the damage dealt by the {{KW|Lightning||2}}.

== Trivia ==
<!-- Include any relevant trivia here, including confirmed references by the devs (Example, The Specimen being a Dorohedoro reference, and different internal names (Example, Gold-Plated Cables being called Cables internally). Please do add sources for any trivia you add here!
-->
* This relic is the same as the Defect's starting relic in [[Slay the Spire Wiki|Slay The Spire]].
